mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assistant_bot_generation_history ( persona_name, board_title, generation_mode, target_post_num, topic, draft_title, draft_body, raw_json, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{history.personaName}, #{history.boardTitle}, #{history.generationMode}, #{history.targetPostNum}, #{history.topic}, #{history.draftTitle}, #{history.draftBody}, #{history.rawJson}, #{history.status}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, persona_name, board_title, generation_mode, target_post_num, topic, draft_title, draft_body, raw_json, status, published_post_num, created_at FROM assistant_bot_generation_history WHERE persona_name = #{personaName} AND board_title = #{boardTitle} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, persona_name, board_title, generation_mode, target_post_num, topic, draft_title, draft_body, raw_json, status, published_post_num, created_at FROM assistant_bot_generation_history WHERE id = #{id}
